parameters.text:
👋 *Welcome to Senior Interview Coach!*

I'm an AI-powered learning bot for senior backend interview prep — built on n8n + Claude (Opus 4.7 Teacher, Haiku 4.5 Examiner).

*What I can do:*

📚 `/learn <url>` — submit any article / docs / blog post URL → I'll extract the content and produce a structured summary (5-7 key points + main concepts + difficulty) calibrated to the senior backend bar.

🎯 `/quiz` — pick from your saved materials → I'll generate 5 interview-style multiple-choice questions specific to that material, with intelligent answer validation and explanations.

📊 `/stats` — see your learning dashboard (materials, quizzes taken, average score, weak topics).

*Try me right now:*
`/learn https://martinfowler.com/articles/microservices.html`

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO app.learning_materials (chat_id, url, title, content, summary_json, difficulty)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5::jsonb, $6)
ON CONFLICT (chat_id, url) DO UPDATE SET
  title = EXCLUDED.title,
  content = EXCLUDED.content,
  summary_json = EXCLUDED.summary_json,
  difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty,
  added_at = now()
RETURNING id, chat_id, url, title, summary_json, difficulty;
SELECT id, title, difficulty FROM app.learning_materials WHERE chat_id = $1 ORDER BY added_at DESC LIMIT 20;
SELECT id, material_id, chat_id, questions, started_at, finished_at FROM app.quizzes WHERE id = $1;

INSERT INTO app.quiz_answers (quiz_id, question_id, user_answer, correct)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
ON CONFLICT (quiz_id, question_id) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id;

WITH agg AS (
  SELECT quiz_id,
         ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN correct THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*))::INT AS score_pct
  FROM app.quiz_answers
  WHERE quiz_id = $1
  GROUP BY quiz_id
)
UPDATE app.quizzes q
SET finished_at = now(), score_pct = agg.score_pct
FROM agg
WHERE q.id = agg.quiz_id
RETURNING q.id, q.score_pct;
SELECT qa.question_id, qa.user_answer, qa.correct, q.questions FROM app.quiz_answers qa JOIN app.quizzes q ON q.id = qa.quiz_id WHERE qa.quiz_id = $1 ORDER BY qa.question_id;

SELECT materials_count, quizzes_taken, COALESCE(avg_score_pct, 0) AS avg_score_pct, last_quiz_at, advanced_materials, intermediate_materials, beginner_materials FROM app.v_user_stats WHERE chat_id = $1;

parameters.text:
🤔 I don't recognise that command.

Try: /start, /learn <url>, /quiz, /stats
